title: App Settings - General - Account
scenario: Account section under App Settings > General displays 'Your Account' with Log in button and 'Share Data' toggle with description
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
7. Tap the back button (or gesture) to return to the App Settings page.
expected: When tapping Account, it expands to show a 'Your Account' section with an active 'Log in' button and the message "You are not currently logged in". A 'Share Data' section is also present with a toggle button and a description about sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to help improve the experience, noting no personal information is shared with third parties. Tapping back returns the user to the App Settings page.
